title: FitnaCraft
description: Small Client side Modpack for the "FitnaCraft" Project from me and my friends
body:
# FitnaCraft
This is just a small client side Modpack for the project called: "FitnaCraft" from me and my friends. (This is not affiliated with the "Fitnacraft" Project from German Ytbers)

## FitnaCraft I
**No official Modpack**

## FitnaCraft II:
Base Modpack was [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) 

### added mods:
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
- [Freecam (Modrinth Edition)](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam)
- [Gamma Utils (Fullbright)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils)
- [ItemSwapper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper) (needed on the Server too)
- [Mouse Tweaks]([https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks))
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaero's Worldmap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
- [Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars)
- [ModChecker](https://modrinth.com/mod/modchecker)

### added resourcepacks:
- [xali's Enchanted Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enchanted-books)
- [xali's Enhanced Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enhanced-vanilla)
- [xali's Potion](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-potion)
